description: The 4 statistical correlation edges from the rare_seeds pilot profile (decision-canvas-os). Imported as CORRELATES_WITH (statistical association, NOT causal) per implementation-kg-plan.md §5e and final-schema-claude.md §8 — never auto-promoted to CAUSES. Endpoints are expressed by concept and resolved against each Metric's concept_key / metric_base / metric_id at import time; an endpoint that resolves to no live Metric is skipped (and logged), so this seed is robust to which dashboards have actually been ingested.

correlations.note: Marketing spend leads revenue by ~1 week (rare_seeds pilot).
Site conversion rate co-moves with revenue (rare_seeds pilot).
Diminishing returns: higher spend correlates with lower ROAS (rare_seeds pilot).
